items.title: Schools shut in five Mizoram districts as heavy rain, winds lash State
items.summary: Aizawl, Serchchip, Lunglet, Hnahthial, and Lawngtlai districts shut schools as a precautionary safety measure, School Education Director Angela Zothanpuii said

items.title: What next for Mali's military leaders after shock of rebel offensive?
